title: Phalaenopsis rimestadiana

taxonomy: Phalaenopsis rimestadiana is a species of orchid native to Borneo. It is a member of the Phalaenopsis genus, which is part of the subtribe Phalaenopsidinae. The Phalaenopsidinae subtribe is a group of terrestrial and epiphytic orchids commonly known as Phalaenopsis. These orchids are primarily found in tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands.
